query:
INSERT INTO vocabularies (word, ipa, exampleSentence, difficulty, wordAudioUrl, sentenceAudioUrl, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('apple', 'ˈæpəl', 'I eat a red apple every day.', 'beginner', NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('cat', 'kæt', 'The cat is sleeping on the mat.', 'beginner', NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('dog', 'dɔːɡ', 'My dog loves to play in the park.', 'beginner', NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('happy', 'ˈhæpi', 'She is very happy today.', 'beginner', NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('water', 'ˈwɔːtər', 'Please drink some water.', 'beginner', NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW());
